title: Jurisdiction. The Secretary shall have exclusive jurisdiction over appeals
content: 45 from the Orders of the Undersecretary of Licensing and Adjudication and the Regional 46 Directors. No Motion for Reconsideration shall be filed before the Regional Directors. 47 However, a Motion for Reconsideration elevated to the Department may be given due 48 course. 49
